Frequently Asked Questions

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept PayPal payments, including credit/debit cards through PayPal. You don't need a PayPal account to pay - you can use any major credit card.

Can I cancel my subscription anytime?

Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time from your PayPal account. You'll continue to have access until the end of your current billing period.

Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?

Yes, you can change your plan anytime. Contact us and we'll help you switch between Basic and Professional plans.

How do I access member-exclusive content?

After subscribing, you'll receive an email with instructions to access our member area. Contact us if you have any issues accessing your content.

Still Have Questions?

Contact us and we'll help you choose the right plan
